examples: The 23-year-old's screams alerted a passerby who went to her rescue.
You are supposed to look at a passerby just enough to show that you are aware of his presence.
The passerby thought he had got an electric shock.
When an old person wants to start a conversation with a passerby, most recognize the need.
We blundered along something called Main Street, seeking the post office, until a passerby directed us to Warburton Avenue.
